title: senna catingae
intro: Senna catingae, also known as the Brazilian senna, is a plant species in the family Fabaceae that is native to Brazil. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to act as a natural laxative due to the presence of anthraquinone glycosides. The health benefits of Senna catingae include relief from constipation, as well as support for digestive health. Herbal preparations of Senna catingae are often made into tea or capsules, and are used to promote bowel movements and alleviate symptoms of irritable bowel syndrome.
